summary: Executed backend pytest (9 tests) and multi-pass Playwright UI validation against public URL. Core pages and forms work; two backend critical issues remain.

critical.issue: Returns 404 Product not found; required slug endpoint is missing.
Returns 500 for newly created checkout sessions due to unhandled Stripe checkout status retrieval error.

integration_issues.issue: Buy Now creates checkout session (200), but status polling API fails with backend 500, blocking reliable post-checkout status flow.

action_items: Add or align required product slug 'digital-forward-2' with frontend/backend product catalog requirements.
Handle Stripe checkout status retrieval exceptions in /api/payments/status/{session_id} and return controlled API response (not 500).
Retest checkout lifecycle: create session -> status endpoint -> success page behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment status endpoint directly propagates emergentintegrations CheckoutError to 500; requires try/except and meaningful HTTP error mapping.
Required endpoint contract and in-memory product data are out of sync for slug 'digital-forward-2'.
seed_data_creation: Created test contact/newsletter entries via API with TEST/qa prefixed data during execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest failure details are in /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Backend log shows Stripe status retrieval 404 from provider then unhandled CheckoutError causing 500 in /api/payments/status. UI flows (home/nav/portfolio/shop/product detail/contact/newsletter/creative lab/mobile menu) passed on public URL.
rca of the issue: RCA-1: Missing product slug: backend PRODUCTS map does not include 'digital-forward-2', so /api/products/digital-forward-2 always 404. Repro: GET endpoint directly. Mitigation: add slug or update requirement and links consistently. RCA-2: Payment status 500: checkout creation succeeds, but status fetch for returned session_id triggers Stripe resource_missing (No such checkout.session), then server raises unhandled CheckoutError. Repro: POST /api/payments/checkout then GET /api/payments/status/{session_id}. Mitigation: catch provider errors, persist provider mode-consistent IDs, and return safe 4xx/200 status payload instead of uncaught 500.
